title: olearia passerinoides subsp. glutescens
intro: Olearia passerinoides subsp. glutescens, also known as the 'Mauve Daisy Bush', is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its compact growth habit and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Olearia passerinoides subsp. glutescens are said to include the ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
